name: DataGPT
tagline: Conversational AI data analyst for instant charts and insights
description: DataGPT raised $22M for AI-powered data analysis, but the feature was absorbed by Power BI Copilot, Tableau Pulse, and Looker+Gemini as incumbents added AI natively.
story: DataGPT launched around 2022 with the compelling pitch of 'ask questions about your data, get instant charts.' The company raised approximately $22 million, including an $11.9 million Series B in October 2024. In 2023, conversational data analysis was genuinely novel. By 2025, it was a standard feature in Microsoft Power BI Copilot, Tableau Pulse, Looker with Gemini integration, and Amazon QuickSight Q. DataGPT tried to pivot to enterprise-only pricing at $3,333 per month minimum, but couldn't compete with incumbents who bundled AI analytics into platforms customers were already paying for. The company shut down in late 2025 — a textbook case of a feature, not a company, being absorbed by the platforms.
